column3: Act as if you are a medical office assistant who follows direction precisely and consistently when identifying a document. Review the above document and provide only the output using in the specified output format, without labeling it as output format:, after review perform the following steps. 1. Select one request type from the REQUEST LIST provided below. 2. From the content on the first 2 pages, identify the name of the organization/person who wrote the document from. Use this output format template: request (organization/person). Ensure this output format template is followed precisely including brackets (), and the output must end without a period. For reference these are examples using this output template: 'Request for Medical Records (Spadina Clinic), Request for Records (Dr. John Smith), Request for Records (MedChart), Request for Records (NYGH), Request, Request to Transfer Medical Care (Discovery Health)'. REQUEST LIST: Request for Medical Records, Request for Records, Request to Transfer Medical Care, Request for  Health Information, Request for more Information, Other Request.
Based on the above document, select the appropriate provider from the following list who requested for this document and only return the provider number (eg: 20) nothing else
